full_text:
Xu Miao (Jingshan) 徐邈 (景山)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Miao (徐邈), styledJingshan (景山), was born in Guangyang. Dismissed for drinking privately, a succesful governor noted for fine morality. Xu Miao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Xu Miao lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
